title: Problems with primitive instantiation using synth_xilinx (executing XILINX_DFFOPT)

features.name: blackbox primitive module with parameter
features.description: Code should include a blackbox module declaration for a primitive (LUT2) with a parameterized INIT value

features.name: primitive instantiation with attribute parameter
features.description: Code should include a primitive instantiation where the parameter is set via an attribute on the instance

features.name: primitive instantiation with parameter override syntax
features.description: Code should include a primitive instantiation where the parameter is set using the #(value) override syntax
